description: Multi-turn: list devices, then ask about one specific device

turns.user: List all devices in the system.
Tell me about sensor-001 specifically — what metrics does it report?

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent should call device list and enumerate all 3 devices
Turn 2: Agent should call device get/details for sensor-001 and report the device's actual metrics (e.g. values.battery, values.batteryVoltage for ne101_camera), referencing the prior turn's context
expectations.overall: Both turns should use English and reference sensor-001's real metrics
